Billing.title: Billing
Billing.pastDueDesc: Your subscription is currently restricted. Reactivate now to restore full access to your workspace.
Billing.nextBillDesc: Next bill in {days} days, you will pay {amount}
Billing.gracePeriodAlert: Your subscription is in grace period. Please renew to avoid service interruption.

Billing.planChangesPre: To make changes to your plan,
Billing.profileSubtitle: Your payment methods, billing currency and store address

Billing.addressAndCurrencyDesc: The options for your billing currency are determined by your billing address

Payments.description: Accept payments via hosted checkout links

Payments.momoDesc: MTN MoMo and Orange Money payments

Payments.webhookSetupDesc: Register the URL below in your Fapshi dashboard settings to receive real-time payment notifications.

Domains.title: Domains

Shipping.title: Shipping

Shipping.bestPracticeDesc: Create broad packages (e.g., "Standard Shipping") and assign many regions/rates to them, rather than creating separate packages for every region. This ensures products can be shipped together easily at checkout.

Shipping.deleteWarning: Products using this package will need to be reassigned.
Shipping.addPackageDesc: Create a new shipping package for your products
Shipping.regionFeesHint: Set different shipping fees for each region
Shipping.useAsDefault: Use as default package for new products
